name: loopy
description: Lightweight loop harness with strict evidence gates.

interface.shortDescription: Strict evidence loop harness without heavyweight ceremony
interface.longDescription: Loopy provides repo-local loop state, explicit success criteria, append-only evidence ledgers, and Codex hook guardrails while keeping workflow overhead low.
defaultPrompt: Use loopy loop begin for new tasks.
After hook approval, Loopy bootstraps the CLI wrapper and bundled custom agents on SessionStart.
Run loopy loop guide --json before choosing the next Loopy command.
Record Loopy evidence for this change, using loopy loop prove when command output is the proof.
